message: The school bell rings even in the dead of night.
The sound echoed in the darkness.
I came back to Kita High without even thinking about it.
The doll I held onto for so long was no longer with me.
It was the first time in such a long time... that I had to stand alone, on my own two feet.
With nothing to support me, all I had was...
I should've just died back then.
All this happened because I didn't die all those years ago.
It was Takuji Nii-san's hateful spirit that possessed Tomo Nii-san.
A curse that he cast on all of us who survived that day.
Maybe Takuji Nii-san wasn't the only one cursing us. Maybe Yuki-san cursed us when she died as well.
Nii-san stabbed himself in the chest.
He destroyed the other half of my self.
And now, he wanted to return so many more people back to the sky.
The day when everyone must return to the sky.
The day when he'll return their souls to the sky.
And what Takuji Nii-san did to me that day...
That's exactly what he was trying to do again.
And this time, he wanted to take far more people with him.
I heard a voice from somewhere.
"It's not a place. I'm trying to tune in."
"That's right. The Mamiya family has practiced Shinto since ancient times. You have the ability to match your mind to the frequency of another. And your mother's Sanami blood is nearly the same."
"So just take your time and match your frequency to mine."

name: Ayana
message: "I am Ayana. You are Mamiya Hasaki-san."
Who is this? I'd never met her before.
Is she a student at this school? She was wearing the uniform, but...

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. The sky that your mother fell madly in love with."

name: Ayana
message: "The point which allows the soul to repeat as many times as it wishes."

name: Ayana
message: "Until you find the exit, you will repeat it over and over."

name: Hasaki
message: "Repeat? I don't know what you mean, but I've never heard of that kind of sky before now."

name: Ayana
message: "So then, will you look at what comes after this?"

name: Ayana
message: "The point where the soul ceases to be reborn."

name: Ayana
message: "The sky beyond that point. Can you see it, Hasaki-chan?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm asking you, what is that? What is there beyond that sky?!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehehe... The cyclical rebirth of the soul. The endless, winding corridor. The mental construct of time."

name: Ayana
message: "It is what lies beyond the armillary sphere. It is what lies behind the shadows cast on the cave wall."

name: Ayana
message: "All-in-One and One-in-All of limitless being and self."

name: Ayana
message: "The outer manifestation of the Primal Chaos."

name: Ayana
message: "Even if no one has given it shape, anyone can understand it. Everyone already knows it."

name: Ayana
message: "Even if such a scene has never appeared in this world, such a scene should not frighten you."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, beyond the bounds of this world, there is another, very common world."

name: Hasaki
message: "Will I look at... what lies beyond this sky?"

name: Ayana
message: "Because the sky isn't anywhere down here."
I could only hear her voice.

name: Ayana
message: "There is only one road that leads to the last sky."

name: Ayana
message: "There is only one road that leads out of this ark."

name: Ayana
message: "That road is much longer than the hill which you, as a child, could never climb. It reaches to heaven itself."

name: Ayana
message: "I am Otonashi Ayana. Nothing more or less."
It was like a mirage, seen by a traveler wandering silently through the desert of eternity.
I heard the wind in the distance.
In the distance, far, far ahead of me.
From far up the ladder, I heard the sound of the wind.
The sound of the wind, which was so far off, gradually grew louder and louder.

name: Takuji
message: "It looks like you want to stay in this time forever, Hasaki."

name: Takuji
message: "I will go ahead, even in this world of endless rebirth."

name: Takuji
message: "My soul will come to reside in another body."
Nii-san's body floated up into the air.
This must be how Yuki-san felt.
The only thing that mattered was that someone I loved was about to plunge into the sky.
I tried to grab onto him.
